title: S.L. Film
overview: Adel, who works three jobs and takes care of his grandmother, falls in love with Roula and wants to marry her. However, her father disagrees because of Adel's low income and social status, and her Aunt fixes her up with a wealthy older man. Adel tries to win Roula back after a series of unfortunate ironic events, all in a sarcastic and weird way.
